root: ^Norman: Remember how I said I never learned how to fish?
^Norman: Do you think I was wrong to not try it?

try_with_me: ^Sam: I think you can still learn right now if you feel a urge to fish! Why not try it with me tomorrow?
^Norman: Don't you think it's too late for me to do that?
^Sam: Why would it be? You've got plenty of time and an interest in the fish, why not give it a go?
^Sam: If you don't like it, then you can just find another hobby to try!
^Norman: I suppose... Then I'll see you here tomorrow?
hmm: ^Sam: I'd have to think about that.
^Norman: No worries, get back to me when you know what you want to say.
